name: @sidetrack/extension
description: Sidetrack Chrome MV3 extension for local AI-work tracking.

scripts.e2e: bun run build && bun run e2e:prepare-companion && bun run e2e:verify && bun run e2e:playwright
scripts.e2e:attach-diag: bun run build && bun run e2e:prepare-companion && SIDETRACK_E2E_MANUAL=1 bunx --bun --no-install playwright test tests/e2e/manual-attach-diagnostics.spec.ts --project=manual --timeout 0
scripts.e2e:recorder: bun run build && bun run e2e:prepare-companion && bun run e2e:verify && SIDETRACK_MANUAL_BROWSER_MODE=persistent-playwright-stealth-experiment SIDETRACK_E2E_STEALTH_EXPERIMENT=1 SIDETRACK_E2E_HEADLESS=0 bunx --bun --no-install playwright test tests/e2e/manual-l5-recorder.spec.ts --project=manual --grep manual --headed --timeout 0
scripts.e2e:manual-stealth-smoke: bun run build && SIDETRACK_MANUAL_BROWSER_MODE=persistent-playwright-stealth-experiment SIDETRACK_E2E_STEALTH_EXPERIMENT=1 SIDETRACK_E2E_HEADLESS=0 bunx --bun --no-install playwright test tests/e2e/manual-stealth-experiment-smoke.spec.ts --project=manual --grep manual --headed
